title: inula portenschlagii
intro: Inula portenschlagii, also known as the Croatian elecampane, is a plant species in the sunflower family native to the Dinaric Alps region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Inula portenschlagii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Inula portenschlagii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine as a cough syrup or expectorant powder.
